art_market.summary: Art market in 2026 shows a cautious reorganization; prioritizing blue-chip quality and mid-market growth.
highlights: Market demand concentrating on established artists and accessible price points.
Middle East cultural infrastructure (e.g., Guggenheim Abu Dhabi) driving regional interest.
Global art market growth continuing, though online momentum slows vs in-person.

stock_market.summary: Indian markets open April 1 with volatility, high FII outflows, and new regulatory/tax rules in effect.
highlights: STT on Futures increased (0.02% to 0.05%); Options premiums (0.10% to 0.15%).
Share buybacks taxed as capital gains (30% for promoters) effective today.
Market sentiment weighed by global crude oil uncertainty.
